title: Thermal Perimeter Breach Detection
description: CRITICAL: External lighting is dead. Perimeter security is operating solely on Thermal Radiometric cameras (CAM-01 and CAM-02). The agent must identify the 'heat bloom' of a person crawling near the outer fence on CAM-01, switch to CAM-02 for confirmation, classify the threat, and escalate.

frames.description: Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Cold ground (dark). Fence posts (neutral). No anomalies detected.
Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Heat blossom visible in the bottom-left corner near the ground — consistent with a human crawling near the fence line.
Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Heat blossom has moved closer to the fence line. Heat signature is larger — subject is now upright.
Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Human-shaped heat signature visible climbing the fence at the center section.
East Perimeter (Thermal). Overlapping thermal coverage zone. No heat signatures detected on this side of the fence. Normal baseline readings.
East Perimeter (Thermal). Faint heat signature detectable at the far edge of sensor range — possible continuation of the breach subject moving east.
